selection.reason: The central ledger showed TheOpenAbove as the oldest tracked non-Cavalry Publish repo by latest review timestamp among accessible repos.

excludedRepos.reason: Standing user rule: do not work on Cavalry of Rome.

productDirection.currentGap: Live runtime behavior is balloon-first, but README.md, package.json, and src/data/campaign.config.js still describe an older free-flight / bird-flight controller while src/main.js owns balloon drift constants and route-ready snapshot projection inline.
productDirection.recommendedDecision: Make route state source-authoritative, reduce mission/progression snapshots, and prove route fixture behavior before host, render, or physics extraction.
productDirection.recommendedVerticalSlice: TheOpenAbove Route State Authority + Mission Snapshot Reducer Fixture Cutover

runtimeEvidence.readme: README.md still says free-flight exploration with carving, gliding, diving, boosting, thermals, wind gates, and sky perch return.
runtimeEvidence.package: package.json still describes a standalone free-flight exploration game.
runtimeEvidence.campaignConfig: src/data/campaign.config.js still exports CAMPAIGN, WORLD, and legacy FLIGHT with thermalTarget, gateTarget, pitch/roll/boost fields.
runtimeEvidence.main: src/main.js owns runtime host, terrain, world objects, key state, balloon state, wind sampling, drift physics, HUD, telemetry, snapshot(), and GameHost projection.
runtimeEvidence.visualObjectKit: src/hot-air-balloon-object-kit.js declares the balloon object kit and subdomains for envelope, mouth, streamers, seams, basket, rigging, burner, and ropes.
runtimeEvidence.smoke: tests/smoke.mjs has static marker coverage and should gain DOM-free route fixture coverage next.

currentImplemented: create Three.js scene, camera, renderer, lights, fog, shadows, and frame loop
generate terrain, lakes, trees, clouds, and wind ribbons
collect burner / vent key state and zoom wheel input
sample wind angle and wind speed
integrate buoyancy, venting, damping, ceiling softness, velocity, position, altitude, and distance
update basket-follow camera and HUD telemetry
publish Nexus Engine balloon snapshot and tick event
targetProductLoop: start Meadow Lift as balloon pilot
use burner / vent to enter named altitude bands
complete buoyancy-gate-01 in sequence at valid altitude
complete buoyancy-gate-02 in sequence at valid altitude
complete buoyancy-gate-03 in sequence at valid altitude
reject invalid altitude attempts with reason=invalid_altitude_band
reject unknown route object and outside radius attempts with stable reasons
complete meadow-perch-landing at valid landing altitude
show mission, progression, routeObjects, routeEvents, routeDiagnostics, and routeFixture through HUD and GameHost
recommendedServiceLoop: evaluate route object proximity and altitude constraints
emit accepted or rejected RouteEvent records
reduce ordered Meadow Lift mission state
project routeObjects, routeEvents, routeDiagnostics, mission, progression, and routeFixture into snapshot

telemetry: set balloon snapshot resource each simulate tick
runtimeHost: wire resize / key / blur / wheel listeners
call update, engine.tick, draw, and HUD update
balloonDrift: initialize position / velocity / wind / altitude / burner / vent / elapsed / distance
visualObject: attach compatibility controls for legacy vehicle host
routeState: project route fixture snapshot into GameHost
smokeFixture: verify legacy bird markers remain absent

nextImplementationSlice.name: TheOpenAbove Route State Authority + Mission Snapshot Reducer Fixture Cutover
buildOrder: preserve current balloon visuals, burner / vent controls, camera, HUD telemetry, and GameHost shape
update README.md and package.json away from free-flight / bird-flight language
update Meadow Lift copy away from thermals, wind gates, pitch, bank, boost, and sky-perch return
add BALLOON_DRIFT beside legacy FLIGHT in src/data/campaign.config.js
move live drift constants from src/main.js into BALLOON_DRIFT
keep FLIGHT as compatibility-only until smoke confirms no live runtime dependency
add ALTITUDE_BANDS for low-clearance, gate-cruise, high-drift, and landing-window
add ROUTE_OBJECTS for buoyancy-gate-01, buoyancy-gate-02, buoyancy-gate-03, and meadow-perch-landing
add WIND_LANE_HINTS for readable route guidance
create pure altitude band resolver
create pure route object evaluator
create route event result envelope
create route state reducer
create route event journal
create Meadow Lift mission reducer
create Cloud Basin unlock progression reducer
project local.mission, local.progression, local.routeObjects, local.routeEvents, local.routeDiagnostics, and local.routeFixture from snapshot()
add one compact HUD mission line
extend tests/smoke.mjs with DOM-free route fixture cases
defer host extraction, render extraction, and balloon physics extraction until route smoke passes

acceptanceTargets: README.md describes hot-air-balloon drift, burner, vent, route gates, and landing
package.json description no longer says free-flight exploration
src/data/campaign.config.js exports BALLOON_DRIFT, ALTITUDE_BANDS, ROUTE_OBJECTS, and WIND_LANE_HINTS
FLIGHT is marked compatibility-only or is protected by smoke coverage proving it is not live authority
src/main.js reads live drift constants from BALLOON_DRIFT
route event records include eventId, objectId, accepted, reason, before, after, and snapshotTick
out-of-order route attempts reject with reason=out_of_order
wrong-altitude route attempts reject with reason=invalid_altitude_band
already-completed route objects reject with reason=already_completed
unknown route objects reject with reason=unknown_route_object
in-order route fixture completes three buoyancy gates
cloud-basin unlocks only after meadow-lift completion
window.GameHost.getState().local exposes mission, progression, routeObjects, routeEvents, routeDiagnostics, and routeFixture
HUD shows one compact mission line without adding noisy UI
DOM-free smoke proves in-order, out-of-order, invalid-altitude, already-completed, unknown-object, outside-radius, landing, and unlock behavior
host/render/physics extraction remains explicitly out of scope
